title: Scheduled Power Interruption Advisory
message: NGCP and LANECO will conduct a scheduled power interruption from 8:00 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. (9 Hours) for the annual maintenance of the Aurora-Kapatagan 69 KV line and various ride-on activities including pole replacement and line clearing.

title: N'RTECH Service Advisory: Internet Restored
message: Internet service has been successfully restored following an outage caused by earlier LANECO clearing operations. Our staff worked an overtime shift to ensure your connection is back online before our Sunday day off.
